title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. euroum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. euroum is a subspecies of the lesser hawk's-beard plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. euroum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as potentially helping to manage certain health conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
